who: HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month
offer: For HR operations in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, delayed completion of onboarding paperwork causes productivity loss. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking via email.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 HR professionals with demo video
Share insights in HR community forums
try_it: Let users try Dashboard for tracking onboarding status and Manual entry option for HR to update paperwork status on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
